name: 2.1 - Amadeus Weather Sub-Agent
description: Deterministic backend weather worker for Oom Sakkie. Reads Supabase-backed weather current and forecast endpoints.

parameters.content: Phase 10.3J: deterministic backend weather read. Routes current questions to /weather/current and forecast questions to /weather/forecast?days=3. No Google Sheets or LangChain nodes in this workflow.

json.input: What is the weather like now?

parameters.content: Phase 10.3J: deterministic backend weather read. Routes current questions to /weather/current and forecast questions to /weather/forecast?days=3. No Google Sheets or LangChain nodes in this workflow.
